title: Space/queryChanges returns all IDs as added instead of real delta
description: Client sends Space/queryChanges with sinceQueryState that differs from current state → response contains every current space ID in the added array with no removed entries, regardless of what actually changed. RFC 8620 §5.4 requires queryChanges to return only items added/removed since sinceQueryState. jmap.rs space_query_changes() takes all current IDs and emits them as added whenever since != new_state, making it impossible for a client to incrementally sync without fetching everything.
